hero.title: Errand Planner
hero.description: Organize everyday errands with categories, priorities, due dates, locations, estimates, notes, and clear completion status.
points: Due today, due soon, and overdue views

flow.title: Capture → Prioritize → Complete
steps: Create categories for common errand types
Add errands with location, due date, priority, estimate, and notes
Finish, reopen, archive, restore, search, and review dashboard metrics

differences.title: Focused errands, not a heavy task manager
differences.description: Errand Planner stays centered on practical daily-life tasks without maps, route optimization, delivery tracking, calendar replacement, or AI automation.

items.title: Record the errand clearly
items.description: Title, notes, category, priority, due date, location, and estimate keep each task understandable.

items.title: See what needs attention
items.description: Dashboard and filters highlight overdue, due-today, due-soon, pending, completed, archived, and cancelled errands.

items.title: Track completion safely
items.description: Complete, reopen, archive, restore, edit, and delete records using shared Ansiversa patterns.

feel.title: Practical and private
feel.description: The workflow favors fast capture, clean review, and simple completion over project-management complexity.

items.title: Easy to scan
items.description: Priority, due date, category, location, and status appear directly in the list.

items.title: Reversible
items.description: Completed errands can be reopened, archived, and restored when needed.

items.title: Bounded
items.description: No GPS, maps, route optimization, delivery tracking, calendar sync, or AI assistant claims.

audiences.title: Who uses Errand Planner
audiences.description: Errand Planner is useful for people managing everyday local tasks.

items.title: Individuals
items.description: Plan groceries, pharmacy, banking, courier, school, home, and vehicle errands.

items.title: Households
items.description: Keep routine errands visible without adopting a work project board.

items.title: Small-business users
items.description: Track office, courier, bank, supply, government, and customer errands privately.

resourceSection.title: Errand essentials
resourceSection.description: A focused workspace for daily-life task follow-through.

items.title: Errands
items.description: Create, edit, delete, complete, reopen, archive, restore, search, filter, and paginate records.

items.title: Categories
items.description: Create and manage simple user-owned categories with color and sort order.

items.title: Dashboard
items.description: Review pending, in-progress, completed, overdue, due-today, due-soon, archived, and cancelled counts.

groupedSection.title: From setup to review
groupedSection.description: The app supports a simple loop from category setup to daily completion.

items.name: Categories
items.description: Group errands such as Grocery, Pharmacy, Bank, School, Home, Vehicle, Business, and Other.

items.name: Fields
items.description: Capture priority, due date, location, estimate, and notes.

items.name: List
items.description: Search and filter by status, category, priority, due state, and date range.

items.name: Detail
items.description: Review one errand and update its status safely.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with the Ansiversa platform model
technicalSection.description: Errand Planner uses the shared shell, generated contracts, isolated backend ownership, and shared UI patterns.
items: Protected routes inside the persistent Ansiversa shell.
Isolated errand database and owner-scoped APIs.
Shared drawer forms, confirmation dialogs, pagination, feedback, and empty states.
